verses.text: When Jeremiah finishes, they call him a liar, claiming Baruch set him against them. They reject the answer they sought. Men who ask guidance with a fixed mind despise it when it crosses their will.
When Jeremiah finishes, they call him a liar, claiming Baruch set him against them. They reject the answer they sought. Men who ask guidance with a fixed mind despise it when it crosses their will.
When Jeremiah finishes, they call him a liar, claiming Baruch set him against them. They reject the answer they sought. Men who ask guidance with a fixed mind despise it when it crosses their will.
Disobeying, they take the whole remnant, even Jeremiah and Baruch, down into Egypt. They drag the faithful with them. Stubborn unbelief carries others into its own ruin.

Disobeying, they take the whole remnant, even Jeremiah and Baruch, down into Egypt. They drag the faithful with them. Stubborn unbelief carries others into its own ruin.
God bids Jeremiah hide stones at Pharaoh's house, for Nebuchadnezzar will set his throne there. Even in Egypt the word follows. There is no refuge from God where His judgment cannot reach.
God bids Jeremiah hide stones at Pharaoh's house, for Nebuchadnezzar will set his throne there. Even in Egypt the word follows. There is no refuge from God where His judgment cannot reach.
God bids Jeremiah hide stones at Pharaoh's house, for Nebuchadnezzar will set his throne there. Even in Egypt the word follows. There is no refuge from God where His judgment cannot reach.
Babylon shall smite Egypt, burn its temples, and break its images. The idols cannot save. The land they fled to for safety will be overthrown by the very foe they feared.
